user.title: Connect to NexGen IoT
user.description: Enter your NexGen IoT API URL (leave default unless self-hosting).

link.title: Link your account
link.description: Enter the code **{link_code}** at [{link_url}]({link_url}) to authorise Home Assistant, then click **Submit**.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the NexGen IoT API. Check the URL and your internet connection.
error.not_yet_approved: Code not yet approved. Approve it at the portal, then try again.
